notes: Entirely clean (0 sorries, 0 maxHeartbeats overrides), 8 theorems that provide the divisor-level theorem of the square for the Route C pipeline. tos_toClass and toClassEquiv'_add_iff (Part C) are not referenced by any other file found in the project and are dead-code candidates.
